name: Wisdom of LLM Crowds: Aggregation and Contamination in Language Model Ensembles

description: arXiv:2607.18269v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The wisdom of crowds -- the finding that aggregating judgments across individuals often outperforms the best individual -- has been extensively studied with human forecasters. Whether the same phenomenon emerges when the ``crowd'' consists of large language models (LLMs) is an open question with both theoretical and practical implications. We...
author: Igor Douven
